h38e1cb59g4fc9g41dag81e0g5fa4f7144ef4: The grove stands. Nature prevails. I owe you my thanks - and an introduction.
hd7fb441bge418g4cd8g92b1gf2a8919dccc0: I am Halsin - First Druid of the Emerald grove... and I sense you have a problem you seek my help with.
h7d4f4f55gdd15g4662ga456gef90fedbdb8f: Yes. I have a mind flayer parasite inside my head. I want your help removing it.
hb5549108g8895g4d27g8b56g2a6f093dd37b: ... that problem. You're infected with the mind flayer spawn, aren't you? Oakfather preserve you, child.
h0e4f0ce7gf43eg409fgbbe8gbf9ba2127dd1: But... something's different. You're aware of the monster inside you. You don't bow to the Absolute, like the True Souls do...
h8610daf2gd3edg487aga513g59a5ce2c179f: It's no coincidence that we found each other, I'll wager? You're after a cure for this parasite.
ha013902bg9244g4be9gb754gbfeaeb843927: There's a chokehold of magic, binding the creature to you. Any efforts to remove it would almost certainly kill you - or worse.
hcd2bb0fag353fg4c4eg8fc7g6470ded282eb: 'Almost'? That means I still have a chance. One I intend to take.
hf6a12b96g451ag4773gaa37g7ffbcbfe82cd: Your resolve is most admirable. It'll serve you well for where you've to go - Moonrise Towers.
hc9ae5a9bg49a4g4f33gb54agcc6d5e5dca5c: That place is where the cultists send their captives. Innocents go in, True Souls come out. It has to be the source of this magic.
h941d72a5gfd6dg4ac3g9a68g25bc90d7b022: And you think I'll find a cure if I find this source at Moonrise?
he30dd35agceb7g4f0bg93a2g934a1ab79e10: Precisely. If we can understand just what this magic is, then perhaps we can rid you of this parasite.
hc886f121ge412g423cg8b8dg8e3c53452d42: It's immensely powerful, whatever it is - strong enough to slow ceremorphosis to a crawl. Luckily that gives you more time.
h9d78ed67g85e5g452ag881ag2313cf7c9de1: I will do what I can to help you. Let us speak tomorrow - you and I both have matters to see to first.
hcd004405g5cb9g4f14g9bd3g02f6aa6e1196: As for what you've done for the grove, speak to Rath. He will see to your reward.
h282b4afagcfdbg48e2gae2fg372b69a8ec7a: That must be where the ship was taking me - before it crashed.
ha23ffc8fga0cbg4e07gb158g358390a4cec7: Be glad it did, or you'd be a True Soul by now.
h250414c1gfa3bg4833gb428gba25929fd040: If we can get to Moonrise and  understand just what this magic is, then perhaps we can rid you of this parasite.
h01172d32g6b2eg4d66gaae7gf45e2af5cf8f: I wasn't taken to Moonrise - I was infected on a mind flayer ship, before it crashed.
h75193f04g768bg4c95gacccgb4668e52520b: And where do you suppose that ship was taking you? Moonrise, I'll wager. The journey differs, but the problem is the same.
hf3e5dbe8g6441g48d6gacfbg98c673be0372: That doesn't sound much like hope to me. Can't you help?
h54d7266fg54fbg4563g8cc5g63f459adfaa5: Patience. I can't just snap my fingers... but I know where the solution almost certainly lies -  Moonrise Towers.
h610d3550g31b8g4a5egae51g501624ef3bd5: This magic isn't typical of ceremorphosis?
h886f37begb184g4312gba76gf1309d1c9a9e: No, this is different. Altered. But I believe I know where answers can be found - Moonrise Towers.
h90ce253agb4e6g46c0gba26ga18dbf3807fc: You learned all this by studying the True Souls?
h831842f6g9f0bg4513ga484ge52b33675668: Indeed. After we dealt with the drow that ambushed us, Nettie and I were able to inspect the corpse - and the creature that slithered out of it.
h25fe6aeag8217g4c89ga218gcd1fc7843f87: I had no idea anyone beyond their ranks was infected. You have my sincere sympathies.
h41ff7413g5fe4g4c0bg9873ga6bb03daf6c4: This magic you mentioned - it isn't normal for these parasites?
h3f35085ag563ag4c8eg8e47g31637e2b28b6: How do you know all this?
h37a41b6fg6f97g4bf0ga61bg2f4be3489e90: A drow forced me to defend myself. Afterwards, I was able to study the parasite that slithered out of the corpse, see what drives these 'True Souls'.
hbd1344a6g3b35g421ag8bfbge718c11afc10: I escaped from an illithid ship after being infected. Maybe the process was interrupted.
h5d7f801cg855eg4f38gae36g04aa8bdbf3c6: Perhaps... but I wouldn't want to place all my faith in blind luck.
h5b16850dg4044g4a8fgac10gb551614ee030: A being called Orpheus is protecting me; shielding me from the worst of the parasite's magic.
h600d1774g6641g47d8gad57g2e67f9b25da7: That sounds... novel. But all right, who is this Orpheus? I'd like to bend the ear of anyone who knows about these things.
h22e46832g9934g43c5gb48fgd7f31b82cd0b: It's... complicated. But he's proven helpful. Trust me.
hee30d9f5g2131g4a3bgabcbg672989cd9509: The grove would likely be a pyre if you hadn't come along. I think I can trust you.
ha1570ad8g56cag4feaga24eg26fa7f364aa2: This 'Orpheus' character might be offering you protection, but it sounds like you still need to find a cure - that's something I can help with.
h4d35ff94g5f80g47b4g9df2g7605cc5902ed: But I'm afraid it won't be easy, or quick.
hdaea2d1ag6654g42e6g9c2aga1208dda7502: I don't know the truth about him. I'm not sure he even has an ear to bend.
h94ebc9ceg6866g496egabfcg68ac0bd569e8: Hmm. There's only so much stock you can place in mysterious friends with unknown agendas.
hc88db04ege1cbg4904gbc3cg78a1f1cd3798: ... it's true. I can feel it right now. Oakfather preserve you, child.
hf00e64b6ga129g4cdega6f0g08063d79d345: I don't know what you mean. What problem?
hc8fd6022g0e28g45b4ga866g2cea0eeebe59: Wait - how did you get here?
h3b0f744dgfa7cg4e33gb65cgf686ad0b0031: I was an unwilling guest of the goblins - but your efforts left them in disarray and I was able to escape.
h897bea6bg2587g4a31g8eb1g3090913f4e9f: Your path will soon take you away from the Grove, I feel. Your efforts will not be forgotten.
ha99b3c3cg4f88g4794g8877gbdba43499f39: With the leadership dead, no attack will be mounted on the Grove. I am in your debt, my friend.
hcc116084gfd46g4b31g873eg8976b9e5c291: Enjoy the respite. Come morning, we have matters to discuss.
hb59969a8g5f0eg4064ga51bg3f53e93b040c: The grove stands. Nature prevails. And again, I am in your debt.
hca755069gb009g49adgb946gffd38bc28066: Speak to Rath - he will reward you for your efforts.
hf3317c52g8a0cg44c5gbf14g949219dfb505: What about my problem? I need to get to Moonrise Towers.
h535b0ab3g100cg4ec4g8ceege5f56485d763: Soon. Remember the dangers I told you about - there'll be plenty of time to face them.
h427599ebg2fdag485cg8772g61158236eee0: Take tonight to rest, recuperate - celebrate. Tomorrow, we can strike out.
h5f20e4c3g059dg49edgababge699cf8f6ac5: Take tonight to rest, recuperate -celebrate. Tomorrow, I'll join your camp so I can help with the trials yet to come.
h1cb54e30g41b8g4559gaf0bg224b15b13fc0: Soon. First I must set matters to rights in the grove. And you should celebrate your victory.
h40543037g714fg4dbag8a77gf458d2969578: After being dormant for so long, your infection is unlikely to produce new symptoms spontaneously.
hb9882433g2756g4437ga218gf4a14f79d50a: Tomorrow morning, we shall discuss what is to come.
h13963b84gb307g41aag8b84g11a7d543111b: No more delays. Tell me what you know about getting to Moonrise.
h5352bd7cgc444g4a42g8998g3ad651514122: If you insist, though hastening me won't make things any easier, I'm afraid.
h24d978d5g9605g46dcg929dg65da039c878c: Travelling to Moonrise is no small task; expect dangers like you've never seen before.
hf2c2dfb7gf8d7g432bg9f77g30aa0c599fa0: Don't be so sure. I'm something of an expert when it comes to imperilling myself.
he2bf7647gc167g481bga9cdg0091d7c77228: Not like this. There's more fingers on a hand than there are survivors of that place.
h8968c43fgda5dg446ega9d8g93b807ef7587: To get to the towers, you'll need to pass through a terrible place - a cursed place.
h8f99029bg1306g49e6gb385g27b82b2b1dd6: This curse shrouds everything in shadow - you will not find life, light or anything natural there.
h222e2fa2g90f1g41f5g91e8gfe58fef3ccae: Any who linger are twisted by the curse; they become shadow beings - tormented, dangerous souls.
hce775e03g424bg4a64g97d2gef397fb7fe4e: Sounds like I've no choice - I need to find a way through.
h373dddffgc6b6g4eecgbf16g62a2c4e6f6cc: You're half-right - you have to get to Moonrise, but you still have a choice of how to get there.
hf52b7898g12b5g4a78gbde4g5f53f2ce2159: You could go overland - along the Risen Road or through the mountains. Easier at first, but you'll run into the shadow curse eventually.
ha35f380age4f7g4421ga057gaf5dea02ac69: You could also go under. There is a tunnel somewhere in the ruined temple of Selûne. It leads to Moonrise Towers through the Underdark.
h4ceefa36g9a8bg4e46g97fag49031a67810c: Long ago, a man called Ketheric Thorm built a secret stronghold deep down there, before rallying a whole army of Dark Justiciars - Shar worshippers.
hcfd2f716ga4c2g4db8gb6c0gb3545d5d4fc8: Dark Justiciars? I must see for myself.
h67eaea26g94d5g4fb1g9402g7dd1ad566932: Aradin and his lot were looking for a way down there - they were promised riches if they retrieved a relic called the Nightsong. But I think there's more.
h836beb08gd1beg42b8g997cg12b4c591729b: From this stronghold, Ketheric's forces could access both the temple of Selûne and Moonrise Towers - but he was defeated before he could launch an attack.
h91e05975g3c8fg4bdeg83b1g6268393cb380: If you can find this place, I'll wager it will reveal a path to Moonrise Towers, bypassing the worst of the shadow curse.
h750ab3d9gf808g4bbag9250gd44dd305b49c: I found the hidden entrance in the Temple of Selûne - the way is clear.
hd51d4d00g9154g4ff2ga78fgbd54ab91f59f: Already...? If only I'd gone with you instead of Aradin.
hca098883gb66bg4d0fg8c55g3aec5e64bb6b: I've already found a way into the Underdark. I can pick up the trail from there.
h70fa2a3dg905dg4cb9g9c3fg7fd513e0b012: So how do I find this underground route?
ha312afbegcb97g41dbgad2dgd35aab552746: You'll need to pick up where Aradin left off - find the hidden entrance. It's somewhere in the Selûne temple ruins, from what I've heard.
h04d525f3g01c9g493fga5a5g73c82413581c: One of the adventurers had a clue to help find it - a dwarf called Brian. It might still be found on his corpse, wherever the goblins left it.
hd85ca817g486ag406bg914eg9456bcddf917: I don't want to risk getting lost in the Underdark - I'll journey overland.
hfbf0730cg0108g4a6fg9c9cgc98fb85a4578: You may reconsider once you see the effects of the curse for yourself.
h58f14b53g0ddag4c11ga364g0098b98ae6a0: But there'll be danger either way, and I'll be at your side in camp, no matter what.
h69a9adb4gd7e0g4346g8245g71016ab2b081: I've long sought to return to Moonrise Towers - unfinished business. It seems our fates have aligned.
hccc206cfg2736g4edcgb032gbd029b0ee7c2: How do I find this passage through the Underdark?
h6e50433cg8aa5g4056gbd44g0bb2fcc07b4e: Say I decide to try this Underdark route after all - how do I get started?
h6a5ecc86g3b37g45e3gb97bg6128cb9cf165: There's no time to waste, then.
h5070616bgbe06g4e1agb210g904771979094: There's a little time to waste, I think. After what you've done for the grove, a little unwinding is the very least you deserve.
hc3220660gbb23g493bg95b5g733697465321: Come morning, I'll have settled my affairs here, and will be free to join your camp and help with what's to come.
h17abe680g102dg47ecgb0ddg9aef25091f0f: I advise you start in the temple of Selûne - if you find the Dark Justiciars' hidden entrance, it could lead you all the way to Moonrise.
h4d0dc86agb9bcg404cg8188ga3c859099ddd: You want to come to Moonrise as well? Why?
ha2bf8736g0087g42bcgaaebg36912494eee7: Those illithid creatures threaten the natural order - it's my duty to do what I can to stop them.
h54ade425ge7a9g402fg9cabg1a2a9e226035: There's also the shadow curse - it's an affront and must be cleansed.
h1f307e70gd8fag412dg922cg88a66992ac06: I helped overthrow Ketheric Thorm and his Dark Justiciars, years ago. But I failed to prevent him from unleashing darkness across the region before he was defeated.
h756c782cgbc2bg4a67gbf71g11f8c874d80c: I spent years researching the curse, trying to put an end to it. Nothing has worked - yet.
h04b654d4g0470g42e5g8730g27429d692707: If I can join you and get close to Moonrise, perhaps I can lift this curse, same as you may find a cure for your infection.
h60ad1f66g63abg4837ga54ege3837c919698: Is that why you went with Aradin? You thought he might uncover this route to Moonrise?
h6cf56d25gca8eg45aag827fg7b2a608be0b8: Precisely. Then perhaps I could have done something about both the shadow curse and ceremorphosis aberrations.
hd93785a0g4518g4383g8d17g2b9b4c8bad1b: But in my eagerness, I put far too much faith in the abilities of Aradin and his band. We didn't even get close.
hf69c0486g5e01g4574gb94ag6e7e53246faf: One of those who died had a clue that was supposed to help us find the hidden entrance to the Underdark.
he886ee15g9c25g4c4dg81f4g04fed58deba8: A dwarf called Brian, I believe. Though there's no guarantee that the goblins left him recognisable.
hb426267fg8e8cg42f2gb6deg4611a266d152: What about the grove? You only just got back.
hd04148c7g5e6fg4c19g89edg50ce064638db: Don't worry. I'll see to whatever needs my attention here. It will be safe in my absence now.
had93098agef01g406ag82f4g4678f2eaba0d: Once I've settled matters in the grove, I would like to join your camp, if you'll allow me. I can offer my skills, my counsel.
h19983f7bg877eg4d49g9f42g5916393015a0: I never thought I'd say this, but it sounds like the Underdark is the safer route.
h53c62b78ge88dg4f8egb860g3970bcddfc6a: Anything is preferable to risking the shadow curse.
h69d20925g5787g4d16ga02bg937792ebb28f: The decision is yours, but I'd favour the Underdark. Even a place like that is the lesser evil compared to the shadow-cursed lands.
h47113d0ag1cf5g4fdaga17egc32191d2da24: This shadow curse - does it affect Shar worshippers?
h9cb1c277g2ddfg491bg8c3fg5849efd20bf8: I don't know. Ketheric's followers were defeated or vanished before the effects of the curse took hold.
h53680f6fgf328g4bafgb1c3gb79c24eece3c: Are these Sharrans still to be found?
h671e2566g69a4g4abbg963ag331245c7479e: As bones, perhaps. But their hidden structures might still remain.
h4136a881g56f1g4c69gba52gd7e1a063f88a: I know the Underdark - it's lethal. I'll travel overland.
h6600f74dga802g467aga388g583de4634128: The Underdark's my home. Better to take that route than risk this curse.
haf232b7ag2938g4808gadc8g6a111ca77658: The Absolute's forces can tolerate such a place?
h8528ff51ga26cg4e8bg9232gbaaa4b14b9d9: So it seems, though I don't know how. You will have to choose your approach carefully.
h4521b1adg4ab3g4f13ga58bg8b075fca0898: There must be another way to cure myself - my kin have dealt with these parasites before.
h3f8cbf78gcdc3g4741gb4d4g4e5073aba40e: There must be another way to cure myself.
hc7051b88g2c26g4a98g88e5gbb87c1c2b41f: By all means - pursue any leads you may have. But I sense all roads will lead to Moonrise.
hcdf8808agaf6fg474dg9a83ga07f8b1181e1: How are you so sure Moonrise is where I have to go?
hf90cccf7g489ag4475gb0bcgc21e08a3535b: Nature speaks to me. Birds report what they've seen. And I've overheard goblins speaking of it too. Moonrise is at the heart of all this, I'm sure of it.
ha219e6f5g84dfg4f58gbe09g53bcccf71c0a: And what does that make you? The thumb?
h6093d50eg63feg424dg8f74g5a51db486d08: Very funny. You'll need a sense of humour for what you've to face next.
hd67a35begc4d8g4524g9ebcg8a83cd4a19b8: Damn. It's never easy, is it?
h81c40319gd40fg4a09gac3eg681a573cdca0: Little of value ever comes easy. And I take it you value your life.
hf11a560cg448fg4f72gaeecg9e2f6c1fbd66: I'm afraid your pupil, Kagha, is dead.
hfed1b820gdfccg4326g97b4g18bcceef5f02: Kagha... poor child. The grove will be a dimmer place without her potential.
hdce5bf52g7d43g4337gaed0g111625befbcf: But the grove still stands even if she does not - thanks to you.
h798f80eegdadeg406ag8154gaa7dd4f4421b: Kagha is dead. She was swayed by Shadow Druids. I had no choice.
hdf14828ag6b77g4adaga491ga28cf89b9174: But you are right - you had no choice. I failed her, long before you arrived.
h50b4274dga53cg4bcag9dddg4eed2fbb91e6: The shadows could not have tempted her if I had taught her as I should have.
h22b3a4d5g1820g4c8cgb86eg11c4c4af46ca: The other druids are dead. They turned on us - we had to defend ourselves.
h0e92f7d8g9dbfg4025g8bc3g6ecbd7d45d17: Yes, you did. You acted according to your instincts, to nature. This is my fault.
h92c5b164g97bcg4389g9dd1g1204289cbb51: I was not here to guide them. Now they rest forever, while I carry the weight of my failings.
h5c749265g0c23g4290g8df0g7b8e3d60b69c: But the grove still stands even if they do not - thanks to you.
he1559feegd5acg4d3dgbd33g7b7711176052: The grove is nature's beating heart - I was glad to help save it.
h23703d93g444cg40f8g8d8eg1b0602603054: I acted to save my kin, not this place.
hb0898699g461fg4bddgb5c1g8922d2c544eb: I hope this grove of yours is worth the bloodshed.
h21701c8ega6c5g475dg929eg4e5be58a59cc: If only you had come to this place in more peaceful times. You'd have been a welcome addition.
hf6fa570bg1412g4eaagbdb9g1e89509fe3b1: And yet save it you did. I am grateful no matter what your motivations.
hb8afcb63gd78cg417agb822g08aa78d0666c: Believe me, it is. The span of a mortal life isn't enough to grasp the importance of this place. Its roots touch everything.
hb21bdfd2gef1eg40f8g8a87g1b976a9fae70: The grove is nature's beating heart - I was glad to help save it.
hba442b11gac65g424cg8e50ge69c3d70f6c3: I acted to save my kin, not this place.
h8553e78fg4956g4b3ag9ee4g1a762820cd41: I did as I wished to. I never cared if this place was saved or not.
habcae521g7594g4892gbaccgedab6ff2e00a: This place means nothing to me, but a great deal to you, it seems. I hope the blood price was worth it.
hd6ac44a1g9525g404bg989bg08b5bdea4ad5: I hope this grove of yours was worth the bloodshed.
h4f0f4571g67d3g4a3egb4dbge9c77a444e37: There's something else I wanted to ask, about getting to Moonrise Towers.
h55e7e7d2gddaag4adaga054g59a8927ec530: Please, ask. Though I can't guarantee you'll like the answers about that place.
hddb3e615g2751g426fg9d15gce53297d1fc1: When you helped Aradin's group before - that was because you thought they might discover a route to Moonrise?
hfa6a7287g1c10g493fga153g1dd726d5fae9: The journey to Moonrise Towers, and all the dangers that that entails.
h8bacbca2g7dc4g49c4g8019gf54ee4160a78: But that's tomorrow's problem. Take some time for yourself tonight - rest, celebrate. Come morning, I'll be by your side.
hc3101e06gbe25g4554gbac8g32d1cea34a88: Rest. Heal. Celebrate if you wish. Mourn if you must. Come morning, we shall discuss delivering you from your parasite.
